case_title: KASPARIAN, ANI VS BURNSTEIN, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY KASPARIAN, ANI AS TO DEFENDANT BURNSTEIN, RICHARD THE NATIONAL DISTRIBUTING GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASPARIAN, ANI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURNSTEIN, RICHARD THE NATIONAL DISTRIBUTING GROUP $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $574.00, DISMISS WITHOUT PRJUDICE AS TO DEFT, BURNSTEIN, NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
